help: Optional. An agent id or its /128 address. Leave blank for your whole tenant.
name: agent
label: Agent (id or /128)

help: Optional. Filter by event kind; leave blank for all.
name: kind
label: Kind

help: Optional window start: epoch-ms, RFC-3339, or relative like -1h / -7d. Blank = a default window.
name: from
label: From

help: Optional window end (same formats). Blank = now.
name: to
label: To
